name: Instagram
description: View your Instagram media, publish photos, reply to comments, and monitor hashtags. Uses the Instagram Graph API — requires a Pro or Creator account linked to a Facebook Page. Configure in the APIs page.

schedules.name: instagram-hashtag-watch
schedules.description: Every hour: fetches new top posts for monitored hashtags (max 30 unique hashtags/week per the Instagram API limits).

examples: Show me my latest Instagram posts
What are the stats on my last Instagram post?
Post this image to Instagram with caption 'Sunset view'
What's new on my monitored Instagram hashtags?

commands.name: instagram
commands.shortDescription: Show your latest Instagram posts and stats
commands.description: Use the instagram_media tool to fetch the user's 5 most recent Instagram posts. Show caption, like count, comment count, and publication date for each. Highlight the best performing post. Also check instagram_get_watched for any new content from monitored hashtags.
